items.name_en: B brand pure original hot 🔥 TB series 'KINGDOM'. Clean and sharp lines, the texture and beauty are super impressive, unintentionally high-end. The gold logo with glossy cowhide is simply retro. This style isn't common, has high recognition, good texture, and easy to match. Do you guys like it?😽 21 x 6 x 16 cm

items.name_en: B brand pure original olive green shoulder bag, underarm bag. Absolutely factory original! 100% all-imported fabric with cowhide. The adjustable strap can be lengthened. The strap features Burberry letter embroidery in jacquard. Also comes with a detachable handle for crossbody or hand carry. The flap has a magnetic snap, very secure. Perfect quality and details! Dimensions: 24 x 8 x 14 cm

items.name_en: B Brand Pure TB Quilted Sheepskin Lauren Mini Bucket Bag, single shoulder or crossbody. Crafted from imported selected soft lamb leather with a smooth, comfortable touch and fine texture. The material is thick and smooth, maintaining shape. Decorated with signature quilting. Filled for a soft feel. Features a Thomas exclusive logo, minimalist modern silhouette, and a gold chain strap. Hidden magnetic closure with 3 card slots. Lightweight and practical. 20X16X4cm
items.name_cn: B Brand Pure TB Quilted Sheepskin Lauren Mini Bucket Bag, single shoulder or crossbody. Filled for a soft feel. Features a Thomas exclusive logo, minimalist modern silhouette, and a gold chain strap. Hidden magnetic closure with 3 card slots. Lightweight and practical. 20X16X4cm

items.name_en: B brand refined tote bag, exquisite silhouette, crafted from plaid and topstitched leather. Features a top leather handle for hand-carrying or an adjustable shoulder strap. At least 30% of the main materials in this piece are bio-based. Bio-based materials are primarily derived from plants and castor oil, other renewable natural resources. 23 x 8 x 19cm. Top leather handle. Adjustable shoulder strap. 1 magnetic snap flap outer pocket; 1 inner slip pocket. Snap closure. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware. Luggage tag
